Title: Model app users

As a system owner
I want an `app_users` model with roles and page permissions
So that application access can be managed separately from raw identity

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] A schema exists for app users, roles, permissions, and timestamps.
- [ ] Frontend types mirror the user and permission model.

Notes: The schema and types exist; activation of the full permission flow is still incomplete elsewhere.
